creator: sunpoet@FreeBSD.org
text:
- Add an option for libinotify

Port maintainer (gnome@FreeBSD.org) is cc'd.

Generated with FreeBSD Port Tools 0.99

How-To-Repeat: 
gamin fails to build when libinotify is installed

% cd /usr/ports/devel/libinotify
% make install
% cd /usr/ports/devel/gamin
% make build
...
